title: nepeta elliptica
intro: Nepeta elliptica, also known as the elliptical catmint, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nepeta elliptica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
